titleStmt.title: SII 9.472: original edition by R. Shama Sastry and N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 472. (A.R. No. 710 of 1917.) ON THE SOUTH BASE OF THE RAMASVAMI TEMPLE AT RAMAPURAM, MADAKASIRA TALUK, ANANTAPUR DISTRICT.

summary.p: This record is dated Śaka 1407, Viśvāvasu, Āśvīja, śu • • (= A.D. 1485 September). Rāyaparāja, son of Bayarājadēva-Chōḷa-Mahā-arasu, is said to have made a gift of land and the channel called Śaṅkaradēvana-kāluve to Narasiṁha-Sōmayāji, Prasanna-Sōmayāji and Lakshmaṇa-Sōmayāji, sons of Daśagranthi-Narasiṁha-Sōmayāji of Āśvalāyana-sūtra, Kāśyapa-gōtra and Ṛik-śākhā on the condition that they would convert the valley adjoining the field into a tank and call it Narasāmbudhi after the name of king Narasiṅgarāya-Mahārāya and that they would allot a portion of the land for the midday offerings to the god Rāmachandradēva. The land was situated in Agaḷi in the Rāyadurga-sthala.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śubhamastu . svasti śrījayādyudayaśālivāhanaśakavaruṣaṁgaḷu 1407 neya viṣvāvasusaṁvacharada Āsvīja śu lēśvara bayarājadēvacōḷa mahāarasugaḷu makaḷu rāyapparājagaḷu Āśvalāyanasūtrada kāsyapagōtrada rukhuśākheya madhusūdanapurada daśagraṁthi narasiṁhasōmayājigaḷa makkaḷu narasiṁhasōmayājigaḷu prasaṁnasōmayājigaḷu lakṣmaṇasōmayājigaḷige koṭṭa
dharmmaśāsanada kramaveṁteṁdare namma nāyakatanakke saluva rāyadurgada staḷada Agaḷiya kereya hiṁdaṇa kariya yalu vittu A haḷavanu nīu kereya kaṭṭikoṁḍēvenalāgi A haḷavanu A sīmeyalu hadinayidu hoṁnina holānu śaṁkharadēvana kāluveyanu sūryyagrahaṇapu(ṁ)ṇyakāladalu raghunāthana saṁnidhiyalu dhāreneredu koṭṭevāgi Ā staḷadalu narasiṁgarāyama
hārāyara hesaralu sarasāṁbudhi Eṁba hesaralu kereya kaṭṭikoṁḍu Ā kereya gaddegaḷa Aḷateyalu nākhaṁḍuga gadenu varugaḷige bhāga mūrakke mūghaṁḍuga rāma caṁdradēvarige madhyā(ṁ)hnadavasarake bhāgi vūṁdakke khaṁḍuga gaddeyanu Anubhavisaluḷavaru . A kāladalu dhāreneṟadu koṭṭa holananu dīkṣitaru tāvē Anubhavisaluḷavaru kereya voḷagaṇa bomagoṁ
ḍana kāluve kōḍiseṭi māḍida hariyasamudrada holananu nimage grāmagrāsavāgi grāsa vāsasthaḷagaḷige naḍayade yiralāgi nāu nimage dhāreyaneṟadu koṭṭevāgi A hariyasamudrada holadali huṭṭida Accukaṭṭu niṁma nāghaṁḍuga gaddeya keḷage muṁde huṭṭidaṁtha Accukaṭṭu hariyasamudrada hola dīkṣitaru rāmacaṁdradē
varu sariyāgi Anubhavisaluḷavaru . gaḷe Aḷateya cāturbhāgake viṁgaḍisida nāghaṁḍuga gade hoṟatāgi modalu dīkṣitarige viṁgaḍisida hola hoṟatāgi ta mayali huṭuva Accukaṭṭanu sariyāgi Anubhavisaluḷavaru gadeya veccavanu sari
bhāgeya gadeyavoḷage koḍaluḷavarū Eṁdu koṭṭa dharmaśāsana . rāyaparājagaḷa voppu śrīrāmacaṁdra .
Digital edition of SII 9.472 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
